_comment: Species: Black Fiend Devil Saint (黑煞魔圣) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Black Fiend Devil Saint

canonical.appearance: Devil saint 10 m, body wreathed in black fiend-flames, eyes burn with devil-fire
canonical.size: 10 m adult, 50000 jin; true form spans battlefields
canonical.behavior: Devil saint; cultivates by absorbing fiend-qi; Wang Lin obtained the wood carving as treasure
canonical.relationships: Wang Lin obtained wood carving of this being as treasure (canon event)
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: black_fiend_devil_saint — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
